title: pelargonium × lautum
intro: Pelargonium × lautanum, also known as Rosy Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, commonly found in the coastal regions of Western Australia and South Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium × lautanum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, capsules, and topical creams, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
